# Platform Docs — rhino-os v3.0

## Overview

rhino-os is a Claude Code native operating system for solo founders. It wraps measurement, agent orchestration, and learning loops into a single configuration system that runs inside Claude Code sessions.

**Core principle**: Measurement drives reasoning. Agents read scores, not vibes.

---

## CLI Commands (bin/rhino)

The CLI is measurement-only (494 lines). All agent logic lives in skills.

| Command | What it does |
|---------|-------------|
| `rhino score [dir]` | Structural lint. 3 dimensions: build (gate), structure, hygiene. Returns 0-100. Cache 5min. |
| `rhino taste [dir]` | Visual quality eval. 11 dimensions via Claude vision + Playwright screenshots. Cache 2h. |
| `rhino bench` | Self-eval. Runs tests/run.sh across 5 tiers: deterministic, functional, canary, capability, autonomy. |
| `rhino status` | System health. Workspace, agent council, sweep state, symlink health. |
| `rhino config` | Display rhino.yml settings. |
| `rhino setup [dir]` | Bootstrap project. Creates .claude/ structure, baseline score, workspace registration. |
| `rhino install [--check]` | Idempotent install. Symlinks skills/hooks/programs, merges settings.json, sets RHINO_DIR. |
| `rhino dashboard [dir]` | Score + experiments + evals unified view. |
| `rhino visuals [dir]` | Generate SVG badges for GitHub. |
| `rhino help` | All commands. |
| `rhino version` | v3.0.0 |

---

## Skills (19 total)

Skills are invoked as `/skill-name` in Claude Code. Each is a SKILL.md symlinked to `~/.claude/commands/`.

### The Core Loop

| Skill | Purpose | Key Output |
|-------|---------|-----------|
| `/strategy` | Map creation loop, find bottleneck, produce sprint plan | `.claude/plans/active-plan.md`, `product-model.md` |
| `/build` | Execute plan. Predict → implement → score → keep/discard | Git commits, experiment TSV, score cache |
| `/eval` | Ship-readiness. 3-tier TDD for AI: deterministic, functional, ceiling | Eval report, history.jsonl, gaps |
| `/experiment [dim]` | Autonomous hypothesis testing. Informed search, not random | Experiment TSV (6 cols), updated learnings |

### Measurement

| Skill | Purpose | Key Output |
|-------|---------|-----------|
| `/score` | Wraps score.sh. Shows trend, integrity warnings, stage context | Terminal display |
| `/taste [--feature name]` | Wraps taste.mjs. Weakest dimension, one-thing fix, would-return | Terminal display |
| `/sweep` | Daily triage. GREEN/YELLOW/RED/GRAY across all projects | `sweep-latest.md`, brain update |

### Intelligence

| Skill | Purpose | Key Output |
|-------|---------|-----------|
| `/scout` | Landscape intelligence. Opinionated positions about 2026 | `landscape.json`, landscape-2026.md updates |
| `/design` | UI/UX audit against 11 taste dimensions. File:line violations | Git commits, brain update |
| `/product-eval` | Full product audit. "Would anyone use this?" | Product eval report |
| `/product-2026` | Auto-loaded reasoning template for product strategy | Inline reasoning |

### System Management

| Skill | Purpose | Key Output |
|-------|---------|-----------|
| `/meta` | Self-improvement. Grade agents, apply 1 fix, verify | grades.jsonl, system fix, brain update |
| `/go` | Autonomous loop. Strategy→build→score→taste→repeat | go-state.json, loop summary |
| `/status` | Dashboard. All projects, agents, scores, taste, sweep | Terminal display |
| `/setup` | Onboard project. Detect type, config, features, baseline | CLAUDE.md, features.yml, workspace entry |
| `/council` | Agent brain summary. Consensus, conflicts, staleness | Terminal display |
| `/docs` | Generate context documents for project | documents/*.md |

### Developer Tools

| Skill | Purpose | Key Output |
|-------|---------|-----------|
| `/smart-commit` | Conventional commit tied to active plan | Git commit |
| `/todofocus` | Scope enforcement. Am I on track? | Terminal: drift analysis |

---

## Programs (3)

Programs are detailed reasoning frameworks executed by skills. Not user-invoked.

| Program | Used by | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `programs/strategy.md` | /strategy | Creation loop mapping, bottleneck diagnosis, sprint planning |
| `programs/build.md` | /build | Scope detection, prediction protocol, anti-sycophancy preamble |
| `programs/meta.md` | /meta | 5 diagnostic lenses (broken, blind, dishonest, boundaries, thinking) |

---

## Hooks (10)

Lifecycle hooks fire on Claude Code events. Configured in `config/settings.json`.

### PreToolUse (fire before tool executes)

| Hook | Trigger | What it does |
|------|---------|-------------|
| `session_context.sh` | All tools (30min cooldown) | Injects workspace, plan, taste score, sweep state, integrity warnings |
| `autonomy_gate.sh` | Agent, Bash | Blocks Agent tool in manual mode. Checks session override (2h TTL) |
| `enforce_ideation_readonly.sh` | Edit, Write, Bash | Prevents editing during ideation phase |

### PostToolUse (fire after tool completes)

| Hook | Trigger | What it does |
|------|---------|-------------|
| `track_usage.sh` | All tools | Logs to ~/.claude/logs/usage.jsonl |
| `post_edit_quality.sh` | Edit, Write | TypeScript errors, console.log, `: any`, secrets detection. Warns only. |
| `thinking_nudge.sh` | Edit, Write | Nudges after N edits without predictions. Blocks after M. |

### Stop (fire on session end)

| Hook | Trigger | What it does |
|------|---------|-------------|
| `capture_knowledge.sh` | Session end | Captures session artifacts to sessions/{project}.md |
| `track_cost.sh` | Session end | Session cost summary to cost-history.tsv. Warns if >5 agents. |
| `extract_patterns.sh` | Session end | Hot files + tool bigrams → patterns.tsv (graduated at 3+ sessions) |
| `check_predictions.sh` | Session end | Prediction accuracy, model health to thinking-health.tsv |

---

## Agent Reference Documents (8)

Located in `agents/refs/`. Mental models that agents read before reasoning.

| Document | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `thinking.md` | Core protocol: Observe→Model→Predict→Act→Measure→Update. 5 rules. |
| `score-integrity.md` | Goodhart's Law enforcement. Scores are diagnostic, not goals. |
| `design-taste.md` | 11 taste dimensions rubric with code-level checks |
| `design-checks.md` | Diagnostic grep commands for design violations |
| `landscape-2026.md` | What wins in 2026. Solo founder reality, campus patterns. |
| `escalation.md` | When to ask for help (almost never). Ship and measure. |
| `opportunity-format.md` | Template for articulating new opportunities |
| `design-tiers.md` | Design scoring levels |

---

## Measurement Systems

### score.sh — Training Loss (cheap, every commit)

**3 dimensions**:
- **Build** (gate): TypeScript compilation, stale build detection, npm build success
- **Structure**: Dead ends (no outbound links), empty states without CTAs
- **Hygiene**: `: any` types, console.log, TODOs, large imports, lint overrides

**6 integrity detectors**: COSMETIC-ONLY, INFLATION (>15 jump), PLATEAU (5 flat), STAGE_CEILING, KEEP_RATE_HIGH, NO_MOONSHOTS

### taste.mjs — Eval Loss (expensive, on demand)

**11 dimensions** (1-5 each):
hierarchy, breathing_room, contrast, polish, emotional_tone, information_density, wayfinding, distinctiveness, scroll_experience, layout_coherence (GATE), information_architecture (GATE)

**Process**: Route detection → priority selection (max 8) → Playwright screenshots (desktop + mobile) → Claude vision eval → scoring with anti-inflation rubric

**Gates**: layout_coherence + information_architecture. If either scores 1-2, overall capped at 2.

### tests/run.sh — Self-Eval (5 tiers)

| Tier | What | Target |
|------|------|--------|
| T1 Deterministic | Syntax, file existence, permissions | 100% |
| T2 Functional | Correct output, determinism, edge cases | 100% |
| T3 Canary | Known inputs → known outputs | 100% |
| T4 Capability | Agent artifacts exist, brains fresh | 80%+ |
| T5 Autonomy | Full loop, multi-sprint continuity | 60%+ |

Current: 242/251 (96%). Remaining 9 need real agent runs, not code fixes.

---

## The Loop

```
/strategy → active-plan.md → /build (predict → implement → score → keep/discard) → /eval → gaps → /strategy
```

Between loops: `/experiment` (hypothesis testing), `/design` (taste fixes), `/sweep` (triage), `/scout` (market), `/meta` (self-improvement)

Autonomous mode (`/go`): strategy→build→score→taste(every 3)→repeat until plateau or 10 iterations.

---

## Autonomy Levels

| Level | Agent Tool | Commits | Loops |
|-------|-----------|---------|-------|
| manual | Blocked | Ask | Never |
| guided | Allowed | Via /smart-commit | Never |
| autonomous | Allowed | Auto | /go allowed |

Set per-project in workspace.json. Session override: `~/.claude/state/.session-autonomy` (2h TTL).

---

## Experimentation Levels

| Level | Exploration Floor | Moonshot Every | Use When |
|-------|------------------|---------------|----------|
| conservative | 10% | 10 | Mature, known patterns |
| balanced | 30% | 5 | Default, growing |
| aggressive | 50% | 3 | MVPs, unknown territory |
